name: portfolio-jose-anthony
description: Portfolio — JOSE Anthony — Administrateur systèmes Linux

scripts.build:js: terser assets/js/main.js -o assets/js/main.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/components.js -o assets/js/components.min.js -c -m
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.watch: npm run watch:css & npm run watch:js
